LanguageData.UB_More_Serial_Cleaner.title: Serial cleaner
LanguageData.UB_More_Serial_Cleaner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had the job of cleaning up after a urbworld mob. Eventually though, [PAWN_nameDef] became too much of a liability to be left alive. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to smuggle [PAWN_objective]self onto a ship to escape, but [PAWN_pronoun] still watches over [PAWN_possessive] shoulder.
LanguageData.UB_More_Astronaut.title: Astronaut
LanguageData.UB_More_Astronaut.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had the job of cleaning up after a urbworld mob. Eventually though, [PAWN_nameDef] became too much of a liability to be left alive. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to smuggle [PAWN_objective]self onto a ship to escape, but [PAWN_pronoun] still watches over [PAWN_possessive] shoulder.
LanguageData.UB_More_Sleepingbeauty.title: sleeping beauty
LanguageData.UB_More_Sleepingbeauty.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s cryptosleep casket was found on an undeveloped world. People from around this world would come to admire [PAWN_possessive] beauty. After someone managed to unlock the casket, [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to flee from [PAWN_possessive] admirers. [PAWN_nameDef] has gotten used to being waited on hand and foot.
LanguageData.UB_More_Oldworlder.title: Oldworlder
LanguageData.UB_More_Oldworlder.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was preserved using an early form of cryptosleep to save them from a then uncurable disease. After being revived and cured of the disease, [PAWN_nameDef] was given an enormous medical bill by the megacorp that revived them and [PAWN_pronoun] has been running ever since.
LanguageData.UB_More_Overseer.title: Overseer
LanguageData.UB_More_Overseer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had the job of managing an organization that prevented the population of an urbworld from knowing about otherworldly forces. [PAWN_nameDef] had successfully neutralized anything from animal-maddening psychic devices to bald humanoids with elongated fingers, and did so under the organization's motto of secure, capture, and destroy.
LanguageData.UB_More_Xenotechnician.title: Xenotechnician
LanguageData.UB_More_Xenotechnician.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for thousands of successful vatbirths. [PAWN_nameDef] eventually lost [PAWN_possessive] job after taking [PAWN_possessive] experiments too far.
LanguageData.UB_More_Shaman.title: Shaman
LanguageData.UB_More_Shaman.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a well respected shaman among [PAWN_possessive] people. They were able to cure a variety of aliments using knowledge gained from their "skyparents".
LanguageData.UB_More_Hippie.title: Hippie
LanguageData.UB_More_Hippie.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran with a counterculture crowd on an urbworld planet. After the group irritated the local junklord with their peaceful protests, they had little choice but to flee to the stars.
LanguageData.UB_More_Stocktrader.title: Stocktrader
LanguageData.UB_More_Stocktrader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a successful stock trading firm. [PAWN_pronoun] was able to outperform most of [PAWN_possessive] department through constant consumption of Wake Up and Yayo, which [PAWN_nameDef]'s employer took a blind eye to. [PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] job after taking part in a "random" chemical test, though [PAWN_pronoun] suspects [PAWN_pronoun] was chosen due to office politics.
LanguageData.UB_More_Handyman.title: Handyman
LanguageData.UB_More_Handyman.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was always handy around the house. [PAWN_pronoun] even had a show about reparing things around the house called "[PAWN_nameDef]'s Improvements". [PAWN_nameDef]'s catchphrase on the show was "ooh-AH".
LanguageData.UB_More_Wrestler.title: Wrestler
LanguageData.UB_More_Wrestler.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a popular wrestler on [PAWN_possessive] homeworld. Even after retiring, [PAWN_nameDef] still feels the need to smash furniture over someone's head.
LanguageData.UB_More_Talkshow.title: Show Host
LanguageData.UB_More_Talkshow.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the host of the "[PAWN_nameDef] Show", where [PAWN_pronoun] would make fun of [PAWN_possessive] guests and try to capitalize on trends. This was until one of [PAWN_possessive] guests burned down the studio. [PAWN_nameDef] was lucky to escape with [PAWN_possessive] life.
LanguageData.UB_More_President.title: President
LanguageData.UB_More_President.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was elected president of an urbworld country. During a war on said urbworld, [PAWN_nameDef] pushed a big red button that activated the country's nuclear arsenal. After activating the button, [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_possessive] cabinet escaped to the stars.
LanguageData.UB_More_Collector.title: Relic collector
LanguageData.UB_More_Collector.description: [PAWN_nameDef] collects ancient technnology left behind. Someday, [PAWN_pronoun] hopes to know what it all does.
LanguageData.UB_More_Junklord.title: Junklord
LanguageData.UB_More_Junklord.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a leader on a post apocalyptic planet. [PAWN_pronoun] used [PAWN_possessive] slaves to find valuable scrap and equipment. After the slaves found an ancient stock of weaponry while scavenging, [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to flee from an armed rebellion.
LanguageData.UB_More_Homesteader.title: Homesteader
LanguageData.UB_More_Homesteader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] life preparing for the worst. [PAWN_pronoun] always kept [PAWN_possessive] shotgun nearbuy to keep miscreants away from [PAWN_possessive] daughter.
LanguageData.UB_More_psychite_oracle.title: Psychite Oracle
LanguageData.UB_More_psychite_oracle.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always had a what some would call "instinct", being able to almost know what is going to happen. When [PAWN_nameDef] started taking chems, that instinct became vivid visions of the future. Since [PAWN_pronoun] discovered this, [PAWN_pronoun] has been using [PAWN_possessive] abilities to the detriment of [PAWN_possessive] health.
LanguageData.UB_More_Technophobe.title: Technophobe
LanguageData.UB_More_Technophobe.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is extremely sensitive to electromagnetic radiation, or atleast [PAWN_pronoun] believes [PAWN_pronoun] is. Oddly enough, [PAWN_nameDef]'s reactions to electromagnetism is dependent on [PAWN_objective] noticing it is nearby.
LanguageData.UB_More_Imposter.title: Imposter
LanguageData.UB_More_Imposter.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s research team discovered a strange creature that could take human form. The research team put a vote to destroy [PAWN_nameDef] under the belief [PAWN_pronoun] was the creature, which forced [PAWN_objective] to escape. Now far from that planet, [PAWN_nameDef] hopes that they picked the wrong one.
LanguageData.UB_More_Android.title: Android
LanguageData.UB_More_Android.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had a job pretending to be an android so advanced they were indistinguishable from a human. During this time, [PAWN_pronoun] picked up some skills from [PAWN_possessive] "creator". Eventually, people stopped buying the ruse, but [PAWN_nameDef] can still do a sick robot dance.
LanguageData.UB_More_Patriot.title: Urbworld patriot
LanguageData.UB_More_Patriot.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes in [PAWN_possessive] country's values, even after going to a far off rimworld. [PAWN_nameDef] fought in three wars and can sing [PAWN_possessive] country's national anthem forwards and backwards.
LanguageData.UB_More_Scrap_Artist.title: Scrap Artist
LanguageData.UB_More_Scrap_Artist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is skilled at making art from what others would call trash. Not everyone gets what [PAWN_nameDef] is trying to convey, but they can all apreciate [PAWN_possessive] skill at the craft.
LanguageData.UB_More_Wastepacker.title: Wastepacker
LanguageData.UB_More_Wastepacker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wasn't the shapest tool in the shed. [PAWN_pronoun] got a job moving toxic wastepacks. While it probably shortened [PAWN_possessive] lifespan, it paid rather well.
LanguageData.UB_More_Thrall.title: Thrall
LanguageData.UB_More_Thrall.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a willing bloodbag for a powerful hemeophage. The "vampire" taught [PAWN_objective] how to cure the sick, but they probably just wanted to keep their bloodbags healthy.
LanguageData.UB_More_Prisoner.title: Prisoner
LanguageData.UB_More_Prisoner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a prisoner on an urbworld planet,but managed to escape using some bedsheets and a razor blade.
LanguageData.UB_More_Xenogerm_Model.title: Xenogerm Model
LanguageData.UB_More_Xenogerm_Model.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had a job modeling the effects of xenogerms for wealthy clients. Repeated xenogerm implantations has left [PAWN_nameDef] with a damaged immunity system and a deluded sense of grandeur, but [PAWN_pronoun] did catch some of the details about the xenogerms [PAWN_pronoun] was modeling.
LanguageData.UB_More_Data_Smuggler.title: Data Smuggler
LanguageData.UB_More_Data_Smuggler.description: On advanced worlds where stolen data can be easily detected, smugglers download data into their own brains to avoid detection. [PAWN_nameDef] was lauded for being able to carry large data packets in [PAWN_possessive] brain.
LanguageData.UB_More_Meat_Vendor.title: Meat Vendor
LanguageData.UB_More_Meat_Vendor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was known to travel the polluted wastes selling meat on a stick. Few know how [PAWN_nameDef] obtained the meat, and the ones that do could never tell the tale.
LanguageData.UB_More_Wanderer.title: Amnesiac wanderer
LanguageData.UB_More_Wanderer.description: No one [PAWN_nameDef] has met knows who [PAWN_nameDef] was before [PAWN_pronoun] lost [PAWN_possessive] memory, but [PAWN_pronoun] remains determined to find out. [PAWN_nameDef]'s travels have led them to acquire various miscellaneous skills, but [PAWN_nameDef] cannot remember what learned in school, or if they even went.
LanguageData.UB_More_ParkMascot.title: Park Mascot
LanguageData.UB_More_ParkMascot.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to work at an urbworld amusement park as an animal mascot. [PAWN_nameDef] got to be pretty good at interacting with the kids, but had to fight off the teenagers who thought pushing [PAWN_objective] over was funny.
LanguageData.UB_More_Renegade.title: Renegade
LanguageData.UB_More_Renegade.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought against the empire's attempts to spread across space, while [PAWN_pronoun] and [PAWN_possessive] band of rebels were not entirely successful, the war taught [PAWN_nameDef] many things.
LanguageData.UB_More_VenomSoldier.title: Venom soldier
LanguageData.UB_More_VenomSoldier.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a mercenary soldier augmented with various toxin based augmentations. Intergalactic transport law required the removal of [PAWN_nameDef]'s augmentations, but their lingering effects have given [PAWN_nameDef] an increased immunity from constant exposure to bioweaponry.
LanguageData.UB_More_CryptoLeader.title: Crypto leader
LanguageData.UB_More_CryptoLeader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the leader of a powerful group that would utilize cryptosleep to see their complex plans to fruition. Unfortunately, unforeseen changes over the past hundred years or so have destroyed the organization [PAWN_nameDef] was once a part of.
LanguageData.UB_More_CryptoSoldier.title: Empire rebel
LanguageData.UB_More_CryptoSoldier.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a group that would use cryptosleep to see the results of their often several hundred year plans. Unforeseen changes over the past century or so have destroyed the group [PAWN_nameDef] was once a part of, but has left [PAWN_objective] with various useful skills.
LanguageData.UB_More_Undertroop.title: Empire rebel
LanguageData.UB_More_Undertroop.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived underground on a planet bombarded with deadly radiation. [PAWN_nameDef] was a hired gun for a powerful underlord, until they were forced to escape as religious fanatics forced people to return to the surface claiming they were the rightful inheritors of the underground. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to repair an abandoned starship and escape the planet, but had to watch [PAWN_possessive] friends and family boil from being exposed to the solar radiation.
LanguageData.UB_More_Underlord.title: Empire rebel
LanguageData.UB_More_Underlord.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the leader of an underworld city on a planet bombarded by solar radiation. A band of fanatics deposed [PAWN_objective] and forced the people of the planet to return to the surface to their deaths. [PAWN_nameDef] managed to hide within the complex caverns long enough for the empire to return to the planet and help them escape.
LanguageData.UB_More_DraftDodger.title: Draft dodger
LanguageData.UB_More_DraftDodger.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was going to be drafted into [PAWN_possessive] country's military. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to avoid the draft by disguising [PAWN_objective]self as an elderly citizen while writing literature condemning the war. [PAWN_nameDef]'s work became immensely popular and even after the farce was revealed, [PAWN_pronoun] was referred to as "granny [PAWN_nameDef]".
LanguageData.UB_More_VampireHunter.title: Vampire hunter
LanguageData.UB_More_VampireHunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a skilled hunter of haemophages on [PAWN_possessive] homeworld. [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to kill some of [PAWN_possessive] friends and family who had embraced the curse. The experience left [PAWN_objective] with [PAWN_possessive] own lust for blood.
LanguageData.UB_More_FleshCultist.title: Flesh Cultist
LanguageData.UB_More_FleshCultist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a cult worshipping a great mass of flesh. The flesh was everything to [PAWN_objective], [PAWN_possessive] caretaker, [PAWN_possessive] food source, even [PAWN_possessive] lover. One day, [PAWN_nameDef] was found attempting to season the flesh before consumption, and was forced to flee the cult in disgrace.
LanguageData.UB_More_Archivist.title: Archivist
LanguageData.UB_More_Archivist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an archivist of ancient and archotech technology. [PAWN_pronoun] was known for [PAWN_possessive] dedication to discovering the secrets of the archotechs and came to this world following tales of a great archotech intelligence.
LanguageData.UB_More_WallBreaker.title: Wall Breaker
LanguageData.UB_More_WallBreaker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a revolutionary on a far-off urbworld. When the archo-counsel separated the world with great walls to make it easier to control, [PAWN_pronoun] joined other revolutionaries in tearing them down and uniting the people.
LanguageData.UB_More_Investigator.title: Investigator
LanguageData.UB_More_Investigator.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an investigator on a far-off glitterworld. Despite the time period, [PAWN_pronoun] insisted on solving crimes while dressed as a classic private eye. [PAWN_pronoun] may not have solved many crimes, but [PAWN_possessive] retro-futuristic charm was infectious.
LanguageData.UB_More_AndroidHunter.title: Android Hunter
LanguageData.UB_More_AndroidHunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a hunter of androids. Despite [PAWN_possessive] profession, [PAWN_pronoun] was terrible at being able to tell who was and was not an android, a trait [PAWN_possessive] employers often used to their advantage. After discovering that [PAWN_pronoun] had been committing wanton murder for megacorporations under the guise of android reclamation, [PAWN_pronoun] fled for the first ship off-world.
LanguageData.UB_More_ScamArtist.title: Scam Artist
LanguageData.UB_More_ScamArtist.description: [Pawn_nameDef] was once a billionaire, untill the price of [Pawn_nameDef] Coin crashed to the ground. Now [PAWN_pronoun] is on the run from the people [PAWN_pronoun] had convinced to buy the currency under the pretense that cryptocurrency had something to do with the booming cryptosleep industry. Despite being a scam "artist", the only thing [PAWN_pronoun] knows how to make are legally distinct monkey pics.
